description: You are an accountant at Northwind Traders. Your supplier 'Exotic Liquids' has started buying products from you, and you have agreed to offset a balance of $200.00. Create a new Customer record for 'Exotic Liquids' and record a Journal Entry dated today to perform the offset. The entry should debit Accounts Payable (Sub-account: Exotic Liquids) for 200.00 and credit Accounts Receivable (Sub-account: Exotic Liquids) for 200.00 with the narration 'Contra entry offset'.
